text-1: Here at IQ Option we work hard to make your trading experience as smooth as possible.
text-2: That's why now our platform will allow you switch from your Demo Account to the Real one and back in just one click!
text-3: To do that you simply need to click your balance in the top right corner and choose the type of account  you need, like so
blue: Now you can go from testing a strategy to applying it to your trading in a blink of an eye.
